goal: Recover from malformed model-generated unified diffs by falling back to bounded full-file replacement.
assumptions: git apply should remain the first patch path.
Full-file replacement is acceptable only after both diff attempts fail.
Security and quality gates still run after fallback writes.
risks: Full-file replacement can change more context than intended.
The model can return explanatory text instead of complete file content.
acceptance: Gemini script maintainability suggestions are implemented.
A corrupt diff e2e test is fixed by fallback.
